testcase.name: news page shows articles
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › iam-content.spec.ts:5:1 › news page shows articles ──────────────────────────────────
TimeoutError: page.waitForSelector: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('div[ux-state="news.loaded"]') to be visible
9 | console.log('PAGE HTML [news]', await page.content()); 10 | // wait for UX3 to initialize and the FSM to reach loaded state > 11 | await page.waitForSelector('div[ux-state="news.loaded"]', { timeout: 10000 }); | ^ 12 | // now articles should be present 13 | await page.waitForSelector('ul li h3'); 14 | const titles = await page.$$eval('ul li h3', els => els.map(e => e.textContent)); at /developer/ux3/tests/e2e/iam-content.spec.ts:11:14
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../playwright-report/iam-content-news-page-shows-articles-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../playwright-report/iam-content-news-page-shows-articles-chromium/video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ../../playwright-report/iam-content-news-page-shows-articles-chromium/error-context.md

testcase.name: market page displays table and chart element

failure.message: iam-content.spec.ts:18:1 market page displays table and chart element
